chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P.NO.S-114 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on MA-6059/2017 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For katcha peshi. 18.09.2017 Mr. Mazhar Ali Laghari, Advocate holding brief for Mr.Bhagwandas Bheel, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Sher Muhammad Laghari, State Counsel. = Respondents No.3, 4 and 5 file their parawise comments through the statement filed by Additional A.G Sindh, which are taken on record and copies whereof have been supplied to the learned Counsel holding brief for petitioner’s Counsel. In this petition, the petitioner seeks directions of this Court to the official respondents to provide legal protection to him as per law. The contents of the parawise comments filed by the official respondents denies the allegations leveled by the petitioner, however, it is clearly mentioned in the comments that in the event the petitioner approaches the official respondents for protection, they shall provide protection to the petitioner in accordance with law. Learned Counsel holding brief for the petitioner’s Counsel after undertaking given by the official respondents in their comments, states that this petition may be disposed of with necessary direction to the official respondents to act in accordance with law. In view of the above, this petition is being disposed of with direction to the official respondents to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and in the event the petitioner approaches them for legal protection the same shall be provided to him but strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE Shahid
